jobPostingInfo.title: Associate Software Engineer
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Job Description:

Associate Software Engineer

The Role

We are seeking to hire an associate software engineer to work within our existing team of software engineers, analysts, and product managers to continue build out the Fidelity Charitable Digital Donor Experience. This application is designed to provide a quick, easy way for qualified participants to easily give directly to the charities of their choice. Each team member will be responsible for ensuring that we deliver an appealing and modern high-quality product to our customers. Our team operates much like a start-up within Fidelity, using a modern tech stack and staying on top of industry standards and best practices. Our team has built a culture that encourages thoughtful conversations, meaningful dialog, deep collaboration, and mutual respect towards a common goal. Team members are encouraged to share their thoughts, be themselves, and bring their unique perspectives into the mix as we grow. Our team uses some of the most cutting-edge software and always looks to investigate using new technologies and paradigms.

The Expertise and Skills You Bring

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related technology field

  • Experience in developing web applications

  • Effective written and verbal communication skills

  • Being a team player and passion to write high quality code

  • Familiarity with Node, Typescript, Java, or other languages

  • Familiarity with relational databases

The Value You Deliver

  • Work with a multi-functional team to understand project objectives, use cases and systems design requirements.

  • Willingness and ability to learn constantly

  • Development of original and creative/innovative technical solutions.

  • You share your knowledge across the team.

Certifications:

Category:

Information Technology

Please be advised that Fidelity’s business is governed by the provisions of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the Investment Advisers Act of 1940, the Investment Company Act of 1940, ERISA, numerous state laws governing securities, investment and retirement-related financial activities and the rules and regulations of numerous self-regulatory organizations, including FINRA, among others. Those laws and regulations may restrict Fidelity from hiring and/or associating with individuals with certain Criminal Histories.
